name: John Doe
title: Full-Stack Web Development Instructor
bio: John has spent over 9 years building production web apps and has taught full-stack development to thousands of career-changers, with a focus on practical, project-based learning.

name: Sarah Chen
title: UI/UX & Product Design Instructor
bio: Sarah is a former product design lead at two design agencies. She teaches design systems, prototyping, and visual fundamentals through hands-on studio-style lessons.

name: Elena Rodriguez
title: Data Science & AI Instructor
bio: Elena holds a master's in applied statistics and previously worked as a data scientist in fintech. She breaks down machine learning into approachable, math-light lessons.

name: Michael Carter
title: Digital Marketing & Growth Instructor
bio: Michael has run growth marketing for early-stage startups and now teaches practical, no-fluff marketing strategy, social growth, and personal branding.
